---
title: "Analyse"
author: "grace"
date: "2026-03-06"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

library(readr)
getwd()
d_socialmedia <-read.csv('../data/BES-2017-f2f-gender-fb-tw.csv')
```

# Hypothesis
H1 Gender is associated with Facebook use

```{r}
chisq.test(
  d_socialmedia$Gender,
  d_socialmedia$Use_Facebook
)
```
